body:
## Summary
- Adds a persisted **Dark mode** toggle to the settings page, driven entirely through the existing CSS custom properties (`--bg`/`--fg`/`--accent`/`--border`) overridden under `html[data-theme="dark"]`.
- Persists the choice in `localStorage` and applies it before first paint via an inline head script on both `index.html` and `settings.html`, so the dark theme is consistent across pages with no flash of light theme.
- Tokenizes the previously-hardcoded header divider color so it adapts in dark mode (per review).

Closes #1.

## Test plan
Manual (no test harness in this static app):
- Open `settings.html`, toggle **Dark mode** → background/text invert immediately, no reload.
- Reload → stays dark, checkbox stays checked.
- Navigate to `index.html` → still dark.
- Toggle off → returns to light and persists across reload.
- No console errors; `node --check src/settings.js` passes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: feat(settings): add dark-mode toggle to settings page
